2606.31845.title: Explicit Fuzzy Logic in the Feed-Forward Layer: Self-Forgetting Quantifiers Discover Legible Grammatical-Licensing Detectors
2606.31845.paper_summary: A transformer's feed-forward (FFN) sublayer materializes the distinctions attention gathers, yet gives no account of what it computes. In a parameter-neutral replacement, each hidden unit is an explicit fuzzy set operation on sigmoid-bounded [0,1] memberships: intersection A*B and set-difference A*(1-B), the latter a bounded positive negation ("A but not B") that gated/bilinear units lack -- a negation-capable FFN (NC-FFN). On N-bit parity they are the most parameter-efficient reasoning basis at shallow depth; at scale (125M, OpenWebText) NC-FFN ties the GELU baseline's perplexity, every unit carrying explicit logical form. Two limits share one cause: two-operand logic localizes to layer 0 and erodes under training, and the one robust grammatical deficit concentrates in licensing and quantifiers, beyond within-token operators. We resolve both with a small block of sequence quantifiers: a soft existential and a soft proportion, each with a per-unit learned forgetting rate from a sticky init. This recovers the deficit at epoch one (halving the wider epoch-two gap), modestly leads on LAMBADA, and makes the FFN legible: the structure now holds and migrates into depth; the decay un-learns its stickiness (median half-life ~1.5 tokens; zero latch units); and at the semantic layers the units read, without dictionary learning, as grammatical licensing detectors: each fires on a licensor (a comparative, a passive participle, a negative-polarity item) and carries its memory forward to predict the licensed word (than, by, nor). This legibility is localized and free only up to a partition (a fully Boolean FFN diverges in training), but the result is a parameter-neutral, language-model-quality transformer with a readable, interpretable-by-construction grammatical mechanism -- an account not just of what a feed-forward layer represents but how it licenses.
2606.31845.paper_summary_zh: Transformer的前饋（FFN）子層具現了注意力所收集的區別，但對其計算內容並未給出說明。在一個參數中立的替代方案中，每個隱藏單元都是對於有界於 sigmoid 的 [0,1] 會員資格的明確模糊集合操作：交集 A*B 和集合差 A*(1-B)，後者是一種有界的正向否定（“A 但不 B”），這是 gated/bilinear 單元所缺乏的——一種具否定能力的 FFN（NC-FFN）。在 N 位奇偶校驗中，它們是淺層深度下最具參數效率的推理基礎；在規模上（125M，OpenWebText），NC-FFN 的困惑度與 GELU 基線持平，每個單元都攜帶明確的邏輯形式。兩個限制共享一個原因：雙操作數邏輯局限於層 0 並在訓練過程中衰退，而一個穩健的語法缺陷集中於許可和量詞，超出標記內操作符。我們用一小塊序列量詞來解決這兩個問題：一個軟存在量詞和一個軟比例量詞，每個都有一個從粘性初始化中學習的每單元遺忘率。這在第一個時期恢復了缺陷（將更廣泛的第二個時期差距減半），在 LAMBADA 上適度領先，並使 FFN 可讀：結構現在保持並遷移到深度；衰退不再學習其粘性（中位數半衰期約為 1.5 個標記；零鎖存單元）；在語義層中，單元讀取，無需字典學習，作為語法許可檢測器：每個單元在許可者（比較詞、被動分詞、負極性項）上觸發，並將其記憶向前攜帶以預測被許可的單詞（than、by、nor）。這種可讀性是局部的，並且僅在分區之前是自由的（完全布爾 FFN 在訓練中發散），但結果是一個參數中立、語言模型質量的Transformer，具有可讀、可解釋的語法機制——不僅是對前饋層所代表的內容的說明，也是對其如何授權的說明。
2606.31845.author: Mark Oskin et.al.
